name: Fox + Mulberry
hero_tagline: Sourdough from the farmhouse kitchen. Plant-based, locally sourced, weekends only.
about: Fox + Mulberry is a small plant-based bakery and community market on Mulberry Street. The loaves come straight from a farmhouse kitchen, the ingredients are local whenever we can find them, and the weekend rhythm is on purpose — slow food, neighborhood pace.

hero_image.alt: A rustic loaf of sourdough bread on a wooden board.

visual_note: Eggshell + flour + mulberry-deep · editorial serif · warm crumb/loaf photography.
